title: dichodon anomalum
side_effects: Dichodon anomalum can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, including itching, redness, and swelling of the skin, as well as respiratory issues like coughing and difficulty breathing. In severe cases, improper use of dichodon anomalum can lead to cardiac problems, including palpitations and arrhythmia. Additionally, prolonged exposure to the plant's toxic compounds can cause liver damage and impaired kidney function. If ingested, dichodon anomalum can also cause gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea.
